title: garlicky x-crisp brazilian chicken tagine
description: a romantic brazilian dish featuring garlicky confit-tomato and crispy chicken served in a traditional clay tajine vessel. perfect for a special occasion or a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, paprika, and cayenne pepper

instructions: heat the olive oil in a clay tajine over medium heat.
add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
dust the chicken with the all-purpose flour and cook for another minute.
add the confit-tomato, chicken broth, spices, salt, and pepper to the tajine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
serve the garlicky x-crisp brazilian chicken tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions.
